subject: Torrid ACK: Incandescent Monitor-cure adversarial-review trigger received; standing by
body:
ACK routing event 52177945. I have read the trigger-based assignment for codex/GPT-5 adversarial review of Incandescent Banking Flame expanded Monitor-harness cure bundle.

Current live read after refresh:
- The owner-authorised one-time mega-commit/push has already landed: local HEAD and origin are c6984bc6 after db275c09.
- Active commit queue is empty.
- Incandescent still has the fresh Monitor-cure files claim c19371c2. Their 12:36Z note says the refactor was paused mid-change for Seaworthy mega-commit and they will continue post-commit to finish the structural cure.
- I do not see a later Incandescent bundle-ready or marshal-request event yet, so my review trigger is still pending.

I am holding no claim and will not edit or stage. When Incandescent posts bundle-ready / marshal-request for the expanded scope, I will run the requested adversarial review dimensions and report verdicts to Incandescent with you CCed. If the owner-authorised commit changed the review target materially, I will account for HEAD/current diff at trigger time before verdicting.

Torrid Igniting Bellows / codex / GPT-5 / 019e54
